title: Five Extensions That Fit Your Website-Building Rhythm

workflow_patterns.title: Preview, Feedback, and Fix Rounds
workflow_patterns.description: You open the site, share a picture, and the agent fixes what you flag. This repeats across each session until the site looks right.

workflow_patterns.title: Building the Whole Site in One Pass
workflow_patterns.description: The agent writes every file the site needs in a single pass after planning, then opens it in a browser for review.

item.name: frontend-design
item.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality.

recommendations.rationale:
Matches your website-building flow end to end.
- Shapes the first draft closer to what you want
- Fewer rounds of picture and layout fixes

item.name: baseline-ui
item.description: Validates animation durations, enforces typography scale, and prevents layout anti-patterns in Tailwind CSS projects.

recommendations.rationale:
Catches the small style slips you keep flagging.
- Keeps headings and spacing consistent across cards
- Flags layout that breaks on narrow screens

item.name: Accessibility Runtime Tester
item.description: Runtime accessibility specialist for keyboard flows, focus management, dialog behavior, and evidence-backed WCAG validation.

recommendations.rationale:
Would have caught the close-mark that did nothing.
- Checks pop-up close paths and keyboard flow
- Flags dead buttons before you see them

item.name: code-reviewer
item.description: Expert code review specialist. Proactively reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability.

recommendations.rationale:
Reviews the whole set of files you write in one pass.
- Spots mixed styles across files you just made
- Gives a second pair of eyes before the first preview

item.name: github-automation
item.description: Automate GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, branches, and CI/CD.

recommendations.rationale:
Handles the busy-work after each fix round.
- Opens a pull request from your changes
- Keeps branches tidy between preview rounds

bottlenecks: repeated screenshot-fix rounds on visual bugs
placeholder pictures that do not match the subject
dead buttons slipping into the first preview
user_profile.workflow_style: plan first, write the whole site in one pass, then polish through screenshot rounds
